# Homepage Mobile Checklist (`index.html`)

```md
- [ ] First viewport answers "what is this?" (hero ticker + value prop + primary CTA)
- [ ] Freshness pill visible above the fold
- [ ] Primary CTA reachable in the lower 2/3 of the viewport
- [ ] Karat strip scannable at 360 px (no horizontal scroll)
- [ ] Entry points (Tracker / Calculator / Countries / Methodology) above the fold or one scroll
- [ ] Nav drawer works at 360 px, opens / closes / traps focus
- [ ] Footer is structured, not a wall of links
- [ ] No layout shift on price update (`min-height` on the price card)
- [ ] All copy via `translations.js`
- [ ] RTL spot-check: 360 px Arabic — hero balanced, CTAs mirrored where appropriate
- [ ] Lighthouse mobile: LCP < 2.5 s, CLS < 0.1
```
